title: GC GAVNO CAVAILIA Ribbed Blanket Throw | Fluffy Fleece Throws For Sofas, Bed, Settee, Couch | Comfortable Extra Large Blankets & Throws | King Size 200x240 Cm | Duck Egg (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
MATERIAL: This fleece throw blanket is made of high quality material (100% polyester) that keep you warm and comfortable.
VERSATILE: This blanket is perfect for use indoors and outdoors whether you're binge tv watching on the couch, working at the office, camping, travelling, or anywhere in between.
PACKAGE INCLUDED: Fleece blanket king size (200cm x 240cm), perfect for bed couch sofa, essential daily use blanket and home decoration.
LUXURIOUS & ELEGANT: Super soft fur of this warm blanket throw feels luxuriously smooth on your skin and is perfect for trapping heat, creating the ideal addition to your home this winter.
EASY CARE: Machine washable to save your time, gentle cycle with cold water. Tumble dry with low heat
